title: Поговори со сверстником
description: Задавай вопросы сверстнику из англоговорящей страны о его дне и выходных

sections.name: Утро
questions: What time do you wake up?
Do you get up quickly or slowly?
What do you do first in the morning?
Do you have breakfast at home or at school?

sections.name: Школа и день
questions: What time do you go to school?
How do you go to school?
What do you do after school?

sections.name: Вечер и свободное время
questions: What do you usually do in the evening?
Do you do homework before or after dinner?
What games do you play at home?
Do you watch TV or videos in the evening?

sections.name: Выходные
questions: What do you do at the weekend?
Do you go to the park or visit your grandparents?
What time do you go to bed on Saturdays?
